text:
The 3 ingredients for a Threads account that grows without you:

1. The official Meta API — no shady bots, no account risk.
2. Free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs) — one-time 2-hour setup, $0/month forever.
3. A self-improvement loop: reads its own analytics daily, writes better posts tomorrow.

That's it. No daily grind. No expensive SaaS. Just a system that compounds.

Comment 'AUTO' and I'll send you the details
